source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'CM_Adjust_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS CM_Adjust_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'CM_Adjust_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS CM_Adjust_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'CM_Adjust_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS CM_Adjust_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_530_Summary_Report_Import258__sink_TableName;

scripts.text:
delete from PLHS.dbo.Tableau_Summary530_CMAdjust
  where cast(Import_date as date)  = cast(getdate() as date) 
;

  delete from PLHS.dbo.tbl_tableau_530_505_ee_other 
  where cast(Import_date as date)  = cast(getdate() as date)
